Data

Data report · Florida DBPR public inspection records · June 2026

The cleanest restaurants in Central Florida are inside Disney.

It sounds like a complaint waiting to happen: captive-audience theme-park food. The inspection records say the opposite. The two cities that make up Walt Disney World — Bay Lake and Lake Buena Vista — grade 83% Grade A. The rest of Central Florida: 64%. And in Bay Lake, every single graded restaurant is an A.

83% Grade A inside Walt Disney World 78 restaurants · Bay Lake + Lake Buena Vista
64% Grade A across Central Florida 2,066 restaurants

Bay Lake: a perfect wall

All 25 graded restaurants in Bay Lake — Disney’s resort core — hold an A, at an average score of 96.2/100. Not one B, C, D, or F.

  • A 100 ATTIC (THE)
  • A 100 MCDONALD'S CORPORATION
  • A 100 LIBERTY TREE TAVERN
  • A 100 JIKO THE COOKING PLACE AT DAKL
  • A 99 TONY'S TOWN SQUARE RESTAURANT
  • A 99 TRATTORIA AL FORNO
  • A 98 COSMIC RAY'S STARLIGHT CAFE'
  • A 98 GEYSER POINT BAR AND GRILL
  • A 96 GRAND FLORIDIAN CAFE
  • A 96 TOPOLINO'S TERRACE FLAVORS OF THE RIVIERA
  • A 96 CRYSTAL PALACE (THE)
  • A 96 BEACHES & CREAM SODA SHOP
  • A 96 HOLLYWOOD BROWN DERBY, 'THE'
  • A 96 NARCOOSSEE'S
  • A 95 BOMA FLAVORS OF AFRICA AT DAKL
  • A 95 WHISPERING CANYON
  • A 95 CAPE MAY CAFE
  • A 95 ABC COMMISSARY
  • A 95 CINDERELLAS ROYAL TABLE
  • A 94 CHEF MICKEY'S
  • A 94 1900 PARK FARE
  • A 93 YACHT CLUB RESORT- ALE & COMPASS: RESTAURANT AND LOUNGE
  • A 93 BACKLOT EXPRESS RESTAURANT
  • A 93 HOLLYWOOD & VINE
  • A 92 50'S PRIME TIME CAFE & TUNE IN LOUNGE

The corridor, broken down

Bay Lake
100% A · 25 graded · avg 96.2
Lake Buena Vista
75% A · 53 graded · avg 93.3
Central Florida overall
64% A · 2,066 graded · avg 88.7

Source: Florida DBPR public inspection records, as of June 2026. “Inside Walt Disney World” means the incorporated cities of Bay Lake and Lake Buena Vista, Florida, which together form the resort’s footprint; it does not imply every venue is Disney-operated. Grades are calculated by us from each restaurant’s most recent inspection. Methodology →
